name: Property Of External Collapsed In Carve
description: @core.utils.now!{} — call utils.now then carve empty. Property -> Execute -> Carve. UNCERTAIN: '!{}' = Execute then space-glued LeftBrace which is LeftBrace (with space) prefix scope, not infix carve. So parses as Execute(...,[]) followed by an empty Scope[] as second statement at the same line — but they would be on same line without separator, which is itself a parse issue. Re-examined: '!{' with no space between is LeftBraceCarve. With no separator after !, the next char '{' produces LeftBraceCarve and infix Carve attaches. Treating as Carve here.
